<!-- Generated with https://github.com/reakaleek/gh-action-readme -->

# <!--name-->Create npm Release Archives<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Create npm tarball and zip release assets from npm pack output.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name                | Description                                        | Required | Default                |
|---------------------|----------------------------------------------------|----------|------------------------|
| `package-name`      | Package name used to build the zip basename.       | `true`   | ` `                    |
| `version`           | Package version used to build the zip basename.    | `true`   | ` `                    |
| `assets-dir`        | Directory for generated release assets.            | `false`  | `temp/release-assets`  |
| `unpack-dir`        | Temporary directory for unpacking the npm tarball. | `false`  | `temp/release-package` |
| `working-directory` | Directory containing package.json.                 | `false`  | `.`                    |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name           | Description              |
|----------------|--------------------------|
| `tarball_path` | Path to the npm tarball. |
| `zip_path`     | Path to the zip archive. |
| `tarball_name` | npm tarball filename.    |
| `zip_name`     | Zip archive filename.    |
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/create-npm-release-archives" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Create release archives"
   id: "release_assets"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/create-npm-release-archives@main"
   with:
    assets-dir: "temp/release-assets"
    package-name: "${{ steps.version.outputs.package_name }}"
    version: "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
```

<!--/usage-->
